## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences on what changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (fixes/changes existing behavior in a way that requires a major version bump)
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes, and I added/updated tests for this change
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] I did not change any existing public method's signature/behavior without flagging it above as breaking
